/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkeslogging.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/liblogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/console.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/multi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/syslog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/component.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslogging.dir/fd_redirect.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -lpthread -lstdc++ /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lpthread -lstdc++ -lm -lrt
